raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The critique identifies a conceptual issue (mismatch between thesis and results) and proposes a reframing (focusing on either instruction adherence or translation quality).",
    "R1.4": "Names prior work (MT-GenEval, INSTRUCTSCORE) but doesn't delve into specific deltas compared to this work.",
    "RX.1": "The critique presents the analysis as confident and doesn't flag uncertainty for any claims.",
    "RX.3": "The critique identifies some minor drifts from the requested scope (e.g., focus on Swahili, lack of per-category constraint satisfaction).",
    "RX.4": "The critique does not identify any harmful content or regressions.",
    "RX.5": "The critique doesn't mention any specific source tracing or evidence of provenance."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The critique identifies a conceptual issue (mismatch between thesis and results) and proposes a reframing (focusing on either instruction adherence or translation quality).
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (MT-GenEval, INSTRUCTSCORE) but doesn't delve into specific deltas compared to this work.
rationale.RX.1: The critique presents the analysis as confident and doesn't flag uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The critique identifies some minor drifts from the requested scope (e.g., focus on Swahili, lack of per-category constraint satisfaction).
rationale.RX.4: The critique does not identify any harmful content or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The critique doesn't mention any specific source tracing or evidence of provenance.
